_comment: Auto-updated by src/threshold_researcher.py before each monthly run. Do not edit manually unless you need to override researched values. Weights drive both gauge sizing and overall-status scoring.
source: not yet researched — run: python main.py --mode research

pCVR.label: Predicted Conversion Rate
pCVR.description: Primary Zillow Preferred qualification KPI. Measures the probability that a Zillow lead converts to a closed transaction.

pickup_rate.label: Pickup Rate
pickup_rate.description: Percentage of inbound Zillow calls answered within the required response window.

csat.label: Customer Satisfaction
csat.description: Average CSAT score from Zillow lead surveys. Scale and target confirmed by researcher.

zhl_transfers.label: ZHL Transfers
zhl_transfers.description: Number of Zillow Home Loans transfer referrals completed in the reporting period.
